subjectTemplate: A Note from The Studio Pilates Events Team
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{Client First Name}},



Warmly,

The Studio Pilates Team

name: First Inquiry Email
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | Initial Inquiry
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{Client First Name}}, Thank you so much for reaching out about a Studio Buyout at The Studio Pilates! We'd love to host your group. We've received your request for {{Preferred Date}} at our {{Preferred Location}} location. Our team is now reviewing studio availability, instructor scheduling, and front desk coverage to see if we can make it happen.
A Few Things to Know Our standard booking window is a minimum of two (2) weeks before the event date. This gives us time to secure an instructor, arrange front desk coverage, and adjust studio scheduling as needed. If your requested date is less than 14 days away, it would be considered a Rush Buyout, which includes a $100 rush coordination fee to prioritize your event. Rush events require full payment within 48 hours of date confirmation.
What Happens Next You'll hear back from us within 1-2 business days with one of the following: • Confirmation of your date, time, and studio • Alternative dates if your first choice isn't available • Payment and booking instructions to lock everything in If you have any flexibility on dates, times, or location, or anything else we should know about your event, feel free to reply here. We're excited about the possibility of hosting you! Warmly, Autumn The Studio Pilates Team

name: Missing Signups
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | Missing Signups
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{Client First Name}}, We're looking forward to your Studio Buyout and wanted to check in. It looks like not all of your guests have completed their sign-up and waiver yet.
Your Event Date: {{Event Date}} Time: {{Start Time}} - {{End Time}} Location: {{Location}}
Next Steps | Please Share with Your Guests All guests are required to sign up in advance so waivers are completed before arrival. Guest Sign-Up Link: {{Signup Link}} Please note: • Sign-ups must be completed at least 24 hours before the event • Creating accounts and signing waivers on-site can significantly delay your start time • Any time spent on lobby check-ins will cut into your scheduled class
To keep things running smoothly, we recommend sharing the link with your guests as soon as possible. Need help tracking who's signed up? Just reply here. Happy to help. Warmly, Autumn The Studio Pilates Team

name: Final Confirmation
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | Final Confirmation
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{Client First Name}}, Everything is officially set for your Studio Buyout! We can't wait to host you. Below is everything your guests need to know. Feel free to forward this to your group.
Your Event Date: {{Event Date}} Time: {{Start Time}} - {{End Time}} Location: {{Location}} Instructor: {{Instructor}}
What to Wear & Bring • Grippy socks are required and are available for purchase at the studio if needed • Comfortable clothing that allows movement • No jewelry with catches or snags during class
Arrival & Check-In Please have guests arrive at least 5 minutes early to: • Check in at the front desk • Store personal items in lockers • Get settled on reformers Arriving early helps ensure class starts on time.
Parking Free parking is available in front of and behind the studio. During peak times, allow extra time to park and walk in.
Setup & Decor If applicable, setup may begin no earlier than 15 minutes before class unless arranged in advance. Any items brought into the studio must leave with the guest. Nothing can be left behind after the event.
You and your group are in great hands. Our instructor and front desk team are ready to make this an amazing experience. Last-minute questions? Reply here anytime. Warmly, Autumn The Studio Pilates Team

name: Event Complete
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | Thank You
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{Client First Name}}, Thank you for choosing The Studio Pilates for your Studio Buyout! We hope you and your guests had an incredible time. Our instructors and front desk team loved being part of your event, and we truly appreciate you trusting us with it.
We'd Love Your Feedback Your experience matters to us. We're always looking to make our private events better, and a few minutes of your time would mean the world. Quick Feedback Form: https://thestudiopilates.com/buyout-feedback
Share the Love Know someone who would love a Studio Buyout? Share your personal referral code and you'll both receive perks when they book: Your Referral Code: TSP-{{Client First Name}} How it works: Your friend mentions your code when they inquire. Once their event is confirmed, you both receive a complimentary class pass.
Want to Come Back? Whether it's another private event, a regular class, or introducing friends to Pilates, we'd love to see you again. • Book a class: https://thestudiopilates.com/schedule/ • Plan another buyout: Just reply to this email! • Follow us: @thestudiopilates on Instagram Thank you again for celebrating with us. It was a good time and we hope to see you in the studio again soon. Warmly, Autumn The Studio Pilates Team

name: Ongoing Discussion
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | Follow Up

name: 48-Hour Missing Signups
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | 48-Hour Signup Reminder
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{Client First Name}}, Your Studio Buyout is in 48 hours! We're so excited, but we need your help with one final thing. It looks like not all guests have completed their sign-up and waiver yet.
Your Event Date: {{Event Date}} Time: {{Start Time}} - {{End Time}} Location: {{Location}}
Urgent | Please Share with Your Guests Guest Sign-Up Link: {{Signup Link}} All guests must be signed up before arrival. Here's why this matters: • Creating accounts and signing waivers at the studio takes 5-10 minutes per person • This will delay your class start time • The class will still end at the scheduled time, so late starts mean less class time • Additional time beyond your reservation is billed at $450/hour
Next Steps Please send the sign-up link to any remaining guests today. If you believe everyone is already signed up, you're all set. We're excited to host you and your group. See you soon. Warmly, Autumn The Studio Pilates Team

name: Food & Beverage Policy
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | Food and Beverage Policy
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{Client First Name}}, Great question! This comes up a lot, so we're happy to clarify. Studio Buyouts are private Pilates classes only. We're unable to accommodate food, beverages, or full event setups inside the studio. This policy protects our equipment and ensures the space is ready for classes before and after your event. That said, we love helping you plan a great overall experience. Here are some nearby spots we recommend:
If You're at Our West Midtown Location The Grove - a short stroll down Trabert to where it meets the Beltline, less than a quarter mile away. Great outdoor seating, food, and drinks on weekends. If You're at Our Emory Location Double Zero - right next door. They offer several private-ish seating areas and often do not require a buyout if you contact them in advance.
Next Steps Let us know if you'd still like to move forward with reserving a date and we'll get the ball rolling from there. Warmly, Autumn The Studio Pilates Team

name: Payment & Date Confirmation
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | {{Event Date}}

name: Deposit Reminder
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | Deposit Reminder

name: Event Details & Sign Up
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | Event Details
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{Client First Name}}, We're all set! Your payment has been received and your Studio Buyout is officially booked.
Your Confirmed Event Date: {{Event Date}} Time: {{Start Time}} - {{End Time}} Location: {{Location}} Instructor: {{Instructor}}
Guest Sign-Ups & Waivers | Action Required All guests must sign up in advance so waivers are completed before arrival. Sign-ups are free. Share this link with your guests: {{Signup Link}} Sign-up deadline: 48 hours before the event. Guests who have not signed up will need to complete the process in the lobby, which may cut into your class time.
Good to Know Arrival: Please have your group arrive on time and ready to go. If there is no class before yours, we may allow up to 15 minutes of early arrival for light setup. This is not guaranteed, and we will confirm closer to the date. Late starts: If the class starts late due to guest arrivals or setup delays, it will still end at the scheduled time unless additional time is purchased. Time & overage: Buyouts are billed at $450/hour. Any time beyond your reserved block will be calculated and charged on the day of the event. Decor: Decorations are welcome but must be minimal, easy to remove, and cannot be attached to reformers or equipment. All decor and personal items must be cleared by the end of your reserved time.
Next Steps Share the signup link above with your guests as soon as possible, and we'll check in as your event date approaches. Questions? Reply here anytime. We're excited to host you. Warmly, Autumn The Studio Pilates Team

name: Second Half Payment
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | Remaining Balance

name: Balance Reminder
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | Balance Reminder

name: Cancelled (No Refund)
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | Cancellation
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{Client First Name}}, We're writing to confirm that your Studio Buyout has been cancelled due to non-payment.
Cancelled Event Date: {{Event Date}} Time: {{Start Time}} - {{End Time}} Location: {{Location}}
Cancellation Details Per our buyout terms, the remaining balance was due no later than two (2) weeks before the event. Because payment was not received by seven (7) days prior: • The studio, instructor, and front desk coverage have been released • The event is no longer on our schedule • The initial deposit is non-refundable
Looking Ahead We understand plans change, and we'd be happy to help you book a future event if you're interested. Any new request would be subject to current availability, pricing, and booking requirements. If you believe this cancellation was made in error, please reply to this email and we'll review. Warmly, Autumn The Studio Pilates Team

name: Cancelled (Refund)
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | Cancellation and Refund
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{Client First Name}}, This email confirms that your Studio Buyout has been cancelled per your request.
Cancelled Event Date: {{Event Date}} Time: {{Start Time}} - {{End Time}} Location: {{Location}}
Refund Details Because you cancelled two (2) weeks or more before the event, your deposit is eligible for a full refund. Refund Amount: {{Deposit Amount}} Refund Method: Original payment method Refund Timing: Please allow up to 10 business days The studio, instructor, and front desk coverage have been released back into our schedule.
We appreciate you letting us know with advance notice. If you'd like to book a future buyout, we'd love to have you. Just reach out anytime. Warmly, Autumn The Studio Pilates Team

name: Payment — Full Amount (14–30 days)
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | {{Event Date}}
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{Client First Name}}, Great news! Your Studio Buyout is available and we're ready to lock it in.
Your Buyout Details Date: {{Event Date}} Time: {{Start Time}} - {{End Time}} Location: {{Location}}
Payment Summary Studio Buyout Rate: $450/hour Number of Hours: {{Number of Hours}} Total Due: {{Total Price}} Because your event is within 30 days, full payment is required to confirm your reservation. No deposit needed. One simple payment and you're all set.
Next Steps | Action Required To officially reserve your date, instructor, and front desk coverage, please complete payment using the link below: Complete Payment: {{Deposit Link}} Before submitting payment, please review our full buyout terms, including capacity, guest sign-ups, waivers, decor guidelines, and timing policies: Buyout Terms & Info: https://thestudiopilates.com/product/private-events/ Submitting payment confirms that you've reviewed and agreed to all buyout terms and policies.
What Happens After Payment Once we receive your payment: 1. Your buyout is locked into our schedule 2. An instructor will be assigned 3. You'll receive a signup link to share with your guests 4. We'll check in as your event approaches to make sure everything is on track Questions before completing payment? Just reply here. We're happy to help! Warmly, Autumn The Studio Pilates Team

name: Payment — Rush Event (under 14 days)
subjectTemplate: The Studio Pilates Buyout: {{Client Name}} | {{Event Date}} — Rush Booking
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{Client First Name}}, Great news! We can make your Studio Buyout happen on short notice. We love the energy. Because your event is less than 14 days from your inquiry, this is considered a Rush Buyout and includes a $100 rush coordination fee. This fee covers the priority scheduling of your instructor, front desk coverage, and studio availability on a compressed timeline.
Your Buyout Details Date: {{Event Date}} Time: {{Start Time}} - {{End Time}} Location: {{Location}}
Payment Summary Studio Buyout Rate: $450/hour Number of Hours: {{Number of Hours}} Buyout Total: {{Total Price}} Rush Coordination Fee: $100 Total Due Now: {{Total With Rush}}
Important | 48-Hour Payment Deadline Payment must be received within 48 hours of this email to secure your date and time. If payment is not received within that window, the date and time will not be held and may be released to other requests. This is not a hold. Your event is only confirmed once payment is complete. Complete Payment Now: {{Deposit Link}} Before submitting, please review our buyout terms: Buyout Terms: https://thestudiopilates.com/product/private-events/
What Happens After Payment 1. Your buyout is locked into our schedule immediately 2. An instructor will be assigned within 24 hours 3. You'll receive a signup link to share with your guests 4. We'll be in touch quickly given the short timeline Questions? Reply here right away. We're prioritizing your event. Warmly, Autumn The Studio Pilates Team
